results.engine_gap: TURN_FACE_UP not yet auto-fired by engine
results.notes: Wired TURN_FACE_UP trigger: first opponent loses 3 life, controller gains 3. Effect is registered and ready when engine begins firing TURN_FACE_UP events.

results.engine_gap: no per-turn face-down ETB tracking
results.notes: Wired end-step trigger that places a +1/+1 counter on self when any face-down creature is currently in play under controller (best-effort proxy for 'entered this turn').

results.engine_gap: TURN_FACE_UP not yet auto-fired by engine
results.notes: Wired TURN_FACE_UP filter on any controller permanent: places +1/+1 counter on the flipped permanent and on Sumala Sentry.

results.engine_gap: TURN_FACE_UP not yet auto-fired by engine
results.notes: Wired TURN_FACE_UP trigger: target_with_callback to bounce another permanent you control + +1/+1 counter on self (counter applied even if no legal targets).

results.engine_gap: activated abilities ({2}{W},{T}: tap+stun) + stun counter system
results.notes: Whole effect is an activated tap ability with stun counters; activation pipeline missing.

results.engine_gap: TURN_FACE_UP not yet auto-fired; exile-then-return-tapped flow uses raw ZONE_CHANGE which may not always reattach
results.notes: Wired TURN_FACE_UP trigger: target_with_callback exiles a nonland permanent. If it was yours, schedules a return-tapped via ZONE_CHANGE; otherwise creates a 2/2 W/U Detective token for the controller.

results.engine_gap: equipment static grants + activated tap-target + sacrifice-to-draw
results.notes: Pure equipment with granted activated ability and sacrifice cost; equipment/activation systems needed.

results.engine_gap: TURN_FACE_UP not yet auto-fired by engine
results.notes: Wired TURN_FACE_UP trigger: places four +1/+1 counters on self. No targeting required.

results.engine_gap: TURN_FACE_UP not yet auto-fired by engine
results.notes: Wired TURN_FACE_UP trigger: target_with_callback bounces another target creature. Static 'can't be blocked by power 3+' is engine gap (separate).

results.engine_gap: activated abilities with cost+target + collect-evidence cost
results.notes: Both abilities are activated; activation pipeline missing.

results.engine_gap: conditional base P/T overwrite + flying/vigilance grant when library empty + hexproof
results.notes: Wired the empty-library draw-skip via make_replacement_interceptor (DRAW amount->0 when library empty). Conditional 10/10 + keyword grants remain unwired.

results.engine_gap: activated ability with sacrifice cost + suspected tracking + conditional draw count

results.engine_gap: activated ability + suspect mechanic state

results.engine_gap: TURN_FACE_UP not yet auto-fired; equipment static +3/+0 grant + manual equip cost are separate gaps
results.notes: Wired TURN_FACE_UP trigger: target_with_callback emits AUTO_EQUIP event to attach to chosen creature. Static buff and manual equip cost remain unwired.

results.engine_gap: ward-by-collect-evidence (variable cost replacement)
results.notes: Ward conditional on collect-evidence cost requires variable counter-spell logic not in engine.
